title: INERRA Carnation Picks - Pack of 140 Artificial Flowers for Floral Foam Tributes, Letters and Funeral Arrangements (Ivory)
features: Inerra Brand, Artificial Carnation Picks in a pack of 140
Each pick features a barbed stem, which is easily inserted into floral foam
Suitable for funeral foam letters, floral tributes and funeral florists arrangements
Each flower head measures 8cm x 7cm approximately. The total product length with the stem is 10cm.
